name: restaurant-platform-mobile-app
description: White-label mobile shell for restaurant owner, captain and waiter users

scripts.sync:android: npm run build:web && npx cap sync android
scripts.sync:ios: npm run build:web && npx cap sync ios
scripts.build:android: npm run sync:android && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.build:android:release: npm run sync:android && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
